zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance De Bretagne於1118年出生在法國崔英德布列塔尼時，她的父親Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne25歲，母親Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany28歲。她和Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1184年6月23日在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance De Bretagne was born in 1118, in Bretagne, Indre, Centre, France, her father, Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne, was 25 and her mother, Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany, was 28. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne. She died on 23 June 1184, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance De Bretagne est née en 1118, à Bretagne, Indre, Centre, France, son père, Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne. Elle est décédée le 23 juin 1184, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Fran: Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Constance De Bretagne 1118 in Bretagne, Indre, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne 25 und ihre Mutter Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany 28. Sie hatte mit Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Juni 1184 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance De Bretagne è nata il nel 1118 nel Bretagne, Indre, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne. Morì il 23 giugno 1184, nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance De Bretagneが1118年にフランスセントアインダーブレタグンで生まれた時，父Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagneは25歳，母Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittanyは28歳であった。彼女はGeoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1184年6月23日にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンで66歳で死去した。

ko.Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Fran: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 메이니
ko.lifeSummary: Constance De Bretagne(이)가 1118년 프랑스 세트르 인드르 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1184년 6월 23일 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance De Bretagne nasceu em 1118, em Bretagne, Indre, Centre, França, seu pai, Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne. Ela faleceu em 23 de junho de 1184, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, com 66 anos.

ru.Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Fran: меиенн, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance De Bretagne родилась в 1118 г. в местности бретагн, индр, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Conan de Bretagne II, Duc  de Bretagne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda fitzRoy Duchess of Brittany, 28. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne. Она умерла 23 июня 1184 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в возрасте 66 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne. Murió el 23 de junio de 1184, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 66 años.
